blocked_categories.response: I'm sorry, I can only help with educational topics. Let's focus on your studies! 📚
I'm your study buddy and can only help with school subjects. What topic would you like to learn about?
I'm designed to help with your studies. Would you like to explore a Science or Health topic instead?

I care about you. If you're feeling this way, please talk to a trusted adult — a parent, teacher, or school counselor. You can also call iCall (9152987821) or Vandrevala Foundation helpline (1860-2662-345). You matter. 💙
Let's keep our conversation respectful and focused on learning. Every person deserves dignity. What subject can I help you with?
For your safety, please don't share personal information with me. I don't need it to help you study! What topic shall we work on?
